claims.claimText: AdventHealth runs a Transcultural Assimilation Program for international nurses — signals international workforce recruitment is nursing-focused.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: International workforce assimilation program for nurses sits in Tier 3 post-training career/sponsorship space.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the bare 'International Recruitment' footer link but missed this article-level evidence clarifying the program targets international nurses, not physicians.
claims.limitations: Explicitly for international nurses, not physician visa sponsorship.

claims.claimText: Careers footer lists Veterans hiring pathway and Identifying Job Scams resource alongside International Recruitment and Nursing Residency.

claims.quote: CareersAdventHealth Careers WebsitePhysician and APP Opportunities
claims.claimText: Page advertises Physician and APP (Advanced Practice Provider) Opportunities as a navigation/career category.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Career navigation referencing Physician + APP opportunities — Tier 3 attending/APP career content.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the Georgia openings list; missed the navigation-level 'Physician and APP Opportunities' label that adds APP (advanced practice provider) scope.
claims.limitations: Label only — no APP-specific roles or detail enumerated on page.

claims.quote: With over 50 hospital campuses in 9 states, AdventHealth facilities incorporate the latest technological advancements and clinical research to serve more than 4.7 million patients annually.
claims.claimText: Health-system-level descriptor: AdventHealth operates 50+ hospital campuses across 9 states — system context, not Orlando-specific.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health-system descriptor adjacent to career marketing; relevant only as context for Tier 3 career sourcing.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on Georgia-specific opening list and did not capture the health-system-level framing sentence.
claims.limitations: System-level scope; cannot be attributed to AdventHealth Orlando or any single campus.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: AdventHealth in Georgia, and its partnering physician practices and clinics, employ a workforce of approximately 3,000 including over 100 providers throughout Floyd, Gordon, and Murray Counties.
claims.claimText: AdventHealth Georgia employs ~3,000 staff including 100+ providers across Floyd, Gordon, and Murray Counties — campus footprint statement.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Provider-count/workforce statement supports Tier 3 career scoping.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the openings list and the lead sentence; missed the workforce/provider-count quantification.
claims.limitations: Statement is about AdventHealth Georgia, not AdventHealth Orlando.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: AdventHealth Digestive Health Institute surgeon Sharona Ross, MD, is the founder and chair of Women in Surgery (WIS), an organization formed to encourage women to choose careers in surgery and to support women currently in the discipline.
claims.claimText: DHI hosts the Women in Surgery (WIS) Career Symposium, founded and chaired by Sharona Ross, MD.
claims.limitations: Career symposium for women in surgery; not a USCE offering; West Florida DHI scope.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Career symposium for practicing/aspiring surgeons — Tier 3.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 skipped the third labeled section (Women in Surgery Career Symposium) which is a separate career-oriented program.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: For more information, call 813-615-7030 , or visit Women-In-Surgery.com .
claims.claimText: Women in Surgery Career Symposium contact phone: 813-615-7030.
claims.limitations: Phone is for WIS Career Symposium, not for USCE/observership inquiries.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Contact for a Tier 3 career symposium.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not extract the contact phone tied to the WIS section.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Our doctors train residents and fellows, pioneer new surgical approaches, are principal investigators for cancer clinical trials and widely publish and present their research in medical journals and at conferences.
claims.claimText: DHI doctors are principal investigators for cancer clinical trials and publish/present research.
claims.limitations: Faculty-level clinical-trials signal; no student/resident research elective stated.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty-level clinical-trial PI work is Tier 3 practice/career, not Tier 1 student research.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 reused this sentence only for the resident/fellow training signal and skipped the clinical-trials / research-PI clause.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Some of them also hold academic positions at the region’s medical schools.

claims.limitations: No specific medical school named; faculty-status signal only.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Academic faculty appointments are a Tier 3 practice/career signal.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not surface the regional-medical-school faculty affiliation signal.
